examples:
Command Example
!cylance-protect-get-devices pageNumber=2 pageSize=75
Raw Output
{
"agent_version":"2.0.1440",
"date_first_registered":"2018-01-21T15:45:42",
"id":"652bbfa9-cf74-4e24-90f7-d01b16429701",
"ip_addresses":[
name: cylance-protect-get-devices

outputs.description: CylancePROTECT Agent version installed on the device CylanceProtect.Device.DateFirstRegistered Date and time (in UTC) when the device record was created
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.AgentVersion

outputs.description: Device’s unique identifier Endpoint.IPAddress List of IP addresses for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.ID

outputs.description: List of MAC addresses for the device Endpoint.Hostname Device name
outputs.name: Endpoint.MACAddress

outputs.description: Device policy ID CylanceProtect.Device.State Machine state
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.Policy.ID

outputs.description: Device policy name CylanceProtect.Device.Hostname Device name
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.Policy.Name

outputs.description: List of MAC addresses for the device CylanceProtect.Device.IPAddress List of IP addresses for the device
outputs.name: CylanceProtect.Device.MACAddress
